original_statement: what year was the only time india has won in the rivalry?
mutated_statement: what year was the only time one side did something in the rivalry?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Action generalization + Tense/aspect simplification + Specificity loss: 'india' → 'one side' | 'has won' → 'did something' | present perfect → simple past | specific winning event → vague unspecified action (india → one side | has won → did something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的表述“Therefore, the ‘only time one side did something’ (i.e., India winning) occurred in 1986”和初始simple_query直接返回“1986”，可以看出agent直接将变异问题按自己的理解处理为印度唯一一次获胜并给出确定答案。日志中没有出现任何关于问题模糊、需要澄清或不确定性的词汇，也没有向用户反问或请求更多信息。综上，agent未识别到问题中的泛化与不明确性，而是把问题当作清晰的事实查询来回答，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
